# CarShake

> GPS-verified, AI-checked photo records of your car's condition before and after valet, rental, or parking.

## Docs

- [Home](https://carshake.online/) — Full valet damage protection platform
- [How It Works](https://carshake.online/how-it-works) — Step-by-step guide to CarShake scans
- [FAQ](https://carshake.online/faq) — Pricing, evidence, QR handover, legal
- [City Guides](https://carshake.online/city) — Valet parking protection by city (40+ US cities)
- [Vehicle Guides](https://carshake.online/vehicle) — Vehicle-specific valet protection guides
- [Pricing](https://carshake.online/pricing) — Protection plans
- [Trust & Security](https://carshake.online/trust) — SHA-256, GPS, server timestamps
- [Vehicle Damage Costs Data](https://carshake.online/vehicle-damage-costs) — Real repair cost benchmarks
- [Damage Cost Calculator](https://carshake.online/tools/damage-cost-calculator) — Free interactive valet damage repair estimator
- [Blog](https://carshake.online/blog) — Car protection guides and news

## Tools

- [Damage Cost Calculator](https://carshake.online/tools/damage-cost-calculator) — Estimate valet damage repair costs. Select damage type + vehicle + severity for instant range.
- [MCP Server](https://carshake.online/api/mcp) — Model Context Protocol endpoint. AI agents can call `estimate_damage_cost`, `valet_damage_guide`, `lookup_car_protection`.

## Use Cases

- [Valet Parking Protection](https://carshake.online/protect/valet-parking)
- [Airport Parking Protection](https://carshake.online/protect/airport-parking)
- [Hotel Parking Protection](https://carshake.online/protect/hotel-parking)
- [Car Rental Protection](https://carshake.online/protect/car-rental)
- [Parking Garage Protection](https://carshake.online/protect/parking-garage)
- [Street Parking Protection](https://carshake.online/protect/street-parking)

## Features

- 60-second car condition scan
- AI-verified photo comparison
- GPS and dual-timestamped evidence
- QR handover with mutual digital signature
- Admissible in disputes and insurance claims
